footer.copyright: Cambell Andijan — Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd Andijan Branch

home.productsDesc: New energy buses and commercial vehicles

about.p1: Founded in March 2017, Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd. is the only enterprise with bus production qualification in Gansu Province. The predecessor was Gansu Tuoling Bus Factory. The company mainly produces pure electric buses, highway buses, airport shuttles, commercial vehicles, delivery vehicles, large-scale power batteries and energy storage products.
about.p2: Lanzhou Guangtong actively seized the opportunity of the country's "The Belt and Road" initiative and explored overseas new energy vehicle markets. In 2019, it acquired and restructured the Ikarbus Automobile Factory in Belgrade, Serbia. At the end of 2018, the company obtained vehicle export qualification approved by the Ministry of Commerce.
about.p3: Lanzhou Guangtong possesses a modern bus production line with world-class standards. Annual capacity: 2000 new energy buses, 1000 bus chassis, and 1500 modified vehicles and logistics vehicles.
about.p4: Cambell Andijan, as the official regional partner and branch of Lanzhou Guangtong in Uzbekistan, delivers new energy buses, commercial vehicles, battery and charging products, technical support and local market development across the Andijan region.

patents.content: Lanzhou Guangtong and Cambell Andijan hold numerous patents and certifications in new energy vehicles, LTO batteries, electric motor control and energy storage systems. As a local branch, we adhere to international quality standards.

join.content: We are always looking for talented professionals to join Cambell Andijan. Send your resume to info@cambell.uz or call +998 94 010 00 11.
